draft:
## 【速報】Fedは静観、AIは熱狂、そして消費には陰りか？ – 今日の市場を読み解く

**リード文**
本日発表されるFRB（連邦準備制度理事会）の最新の金利決定は、市場の予想通り「据え置き」となる公算が大きいものの、その声明文やパウエル議長の記者会見からは、今後の金融政策の方向性を巡る重要なヒントが得られるでしょう。一方で、個別銘柄ではAI関連株の熱狂が止まらず、新規上場企業が驚異的な株価上昇を記録。しかしその裏では、GLP-1薬の将来性に対する疑問や、大手アパレル企業の業績見通し下方修正など

articles.title: The Fed issues its latest interest rate decision Wednesday. Here's what to expect
articles.summary: The Federal Reserve has little choice but to stay on the sidelines this week.

articles.title: Airlines raise revenue guidance despite rising fuel costs, citing growth in demand
articles.summary: CEO Ed Bastian told CNBC's Phil LeBeau that Delta had taken a $400 million fuel hit in the quarter, but that demand has been "really, really great."

articles.title: Lilly gets rare downgrade as analysts question hype over GLP-1 pills and Zepbound’s cash sales
articles.summary: If middle-class Americans lose their jobs to AI, that could mean fewer cash sales of weight-loss drugs like Zepbound.

articles.title: Lululemon reports weak guidance as proxy battle, tariffs weigh on bottom line
articles.summary: Lululemon topped fourth-quarter estimates but gave weaker-than-expected sales and earnings forecasts for 2026.

articles.title: AI Drone Software Stock Jumps 700% in Best IPO Since Newsmax
articles.summary: Swarmer Inc. shares skyrocketed 700% on Tuesday, putting the artificial intelligence drone software maker on pace for the best trading debut by a US stock since Newsmax Inc.’s blockbuster entry nearly a year ago.

articles.title: Exxon Mobil: Avoid Being The Latecomer To The Energy Party (Downgrade)
EOG Resources: Near-Term Boost From The Iran Conflict, But Fundamental Risks Are Rising (Rating Downgrade)
Monetary Policy Rules Suggest Fed Should Hold Steady In March
Sable Offshore Stock: The Surge Offers A Great Exit Point (Downgrade)
U.S. says it may be forced to shut down some airports over funding standoff
articles.summary: The partial government shutdown has forced 50,000 Transportation Security Administration airport security officers to work without pay for the last month.
